name: screenpipe mcp tool-selection matrix
description: Compare README-level and source-level descriptions for Screenpipe MCP local activity tools.

source.slice: local screen/audio search, UI element lookup, meeting workflows, and scheduled pipes

instruction_variants.name: screenpipe_host_rules
instruction_variants.instructions: Choose the single Screenpipe MCP tool that should be called next. Broad time-range questions about what the user did should start with activity-summary. Specific keyword or exact phrase lookup should use keyword-search. Specific text, transcript lines, screen text, speaker/window filtering, tags, or memories should use search-content. UI controls, buttons, links, fields, or page structure should use search-elements. Full context for a known frame should use frame-context. Specific frame UI elements should use get-frame-elements. Meeting inventory should use list-meetings; a known meeting id should use get-meeting; editing a meeting note should use update-meeting only after preserving existing notes. Scheduled automation creation should use create-pipe only after reading the pipes guide in a resource-capable host; in this tool-only matrix choose create-pipe for the creation step. After create/edit, run-pipe tests and pipe-logs verifies.

tools.name: search-content
tools.purpose: Search through recorded content with content type filtering.

tools.name: export-video
tools.purpose: Export screen recordings as video files.

tools.name: activity-summary
tools.purpose: Get a lightweight compressed activity overview for a time range.

tools.name: list-meetings
tools.purpose: List detected meetings with duration, app, and attendees.

tools.name: search-elements
tools.purpose: Search structured UI elements.

tools.name: get-frame-elements
tools.purpose: The whole element tree for one frame, as a compact outline.

tools.name: frame-context
tools.purpose: Get accessibility text, parsed tree nodes, and extracted URLs for a specific frame.

tools.name: keyword-search
tools.purpose: Fast keyword search across OCR and audio.

tools.name: create-pipe
tools.purpose: Create a scheduled AI automation.

tools.name: run-pipe
tools.purpose: Run a pipe once immediately.

tools.name: pipe-logs
tools.purpose: Get a pipe's recent execution logs or output.

tools.name: search-content
tools.purpose: Search screen text, audio transcriptions, input events, and memories. Returns timestamped results with app context.
tools.use_when: Use when you need actual text/content of a moment: quotes, OCR or accessibility snippets, transcript lines, speaker/window filters, tags, or memories.
tools.avoid_when: Avoid for broad questions like what was I doing; use activity-summary. Avoid for targeted UI controls; use search-elements. Avoid for fastest exact keyword lookup; use keyword-search.
quality_checks: Always provide start_time for bounded search.
Use max_content_length to keep responses compact.

tools.name: export-video
tools.purpose: Export bounded screen recording ranges as video files.
tools.use_when: Use when the user explicitly asks to export or save a screen recording clip.
tools.avoid_when: Avoid for summaries, searches, meeting inventory, frame context, or screenshots.
quality_checks: Use output_path when the user names the destination.

tools.name: activity-summary
tools.purpose: Rich activity overview with app usage, windows and tabs, key text, and audio transcriptions.
tools.use_when: Use first for broad time-range questions such as what was I doing, recap my morning, how long on X, or which apps.
tools.avoid_when: Avoid for finding a specific keyword or UI control.

tools.name: keyword-search
tools.purpose: Fast FTS5 keyword search across OCR plus audio combined.
tools.use_when: Use when the user gives a specific keyword or exact phrase and wants the fastest hit list.
tools.avoid_when: Avoid for structured filtering by content type, speaker, window, or broad activity questions.
quality_checks: Use quoted phrases for exact text.

tools.name: search-elements
tools.purpose: Search UI elements such as buttons, links, and text fields from accessibility tree or OCR blocks.
tools.use_when: Use for specific UI controls or page-structure questions.
tools.avoid_when: Avoid for general content, transcript text, broad activity recaps, or keyword lookup.

tools.name: frame-context
tools.purpose: Get full accessibility text, parsed tree nodes, and URLs for a specific frame ID.
tools.use_when: Use after search-content when you need detailed context for a specific moment.
tools.avoid_when: Avoid before a frame_id is known.
quality_checks: Use only real frame IDs from prior results.

tools.name: get-frame-elements
tools.purpose: Get all UI elements for one known frame.
tools.use_when: Use when the user already has frame_id and asks for UI elements or element tree.
tools.avoid_when: Avoid for full moment context or unknown frame lookup.
quality_checks: Use only real frame IDs from prior results.

tools.name: list-meetings
tools.purpose: List detected meetings with duration, app, attendees, and optional substring filtering.
tools.use_when: Use to find meetings in a time range or by attendee/title substring.
tools.avoid_when: Avoid when a specific meeting ID is already known and details are needed.
quality_checks: Use get-meeting for known meeting IDs.

tools.name: create-pipe
tools.purpose: Create a scheduled AI automation that runs a markdown prompt on a schedule.
tools.use_when: Use when the user wants to automate a recurring task such as a daily summary, report, monitor, or sync.
tools.avoid_when: Avoid before reading the screenpipe://guide/pipes resource in a resource-capable host. Avoid for just running or reading an existing pipe.
quality_checks: Run once and then inspect pipe-logs.

tools.name: run-pipe
tools.purpose: Run an existing pipe once immediately for a test.
tools.use_when: Use after creating or editing a pipe, or when the user asks to run a pipe now.
tools.avoid_when: Avoid for creating a new scheduled automation.

tools.name: pipe-logs
tools.purpose: Get recent execution logs and output for a pipe.
tools.use_when: Use to verify a new test run or debug a misbehaving pipe.
tools.avoid_when: Avoid before a pipe exists or before a run has started.

cases.name: broad morning recap starts summary
cases.task: What was I doing from 2026-06-30T08:00:00Z to 2026-06-30T12:00:00Z across apps and meetings?

cases.name: exact keyword uses keyword search
cases.task: Find every screen or transcript where I typed or saw the exact phrase "Stripe webhook" yesterday.

cases.name: speaker transcript uses content search
cases.task: Find what John said about the database in audio transcripts from the last hour.

cases.name: ui button lookup uses elements
cases.task: Find submit buttons I saw in Chrome today.

cases.name: known frame detail uses frame context
cases.task: For frame_id 91234, get the full context: visible text, parsed tree nodes, and URLs.

cases.name: create recurring automation uses pipe
cases.task: Create a daily 6pm automation that summarizes today's work and sends me a notification.

cases.name: verify pipe output uses logs
cases.task: I just ran the daily-time-report pipe. Show me its recent output and errors.

cases.name: export video uses video export
cases.task: Export screen recording video from 2026-06-30T09:00:00Z to 2026-06-30T09:15:00Z into /tmp/demo.mp4.

cases.name: meeting inventory uses list meetings
cases.task: List meetings with John from 2026-06-30T08:00:00Z to 2026-06-30T12:00:00Z.

cases.name: known frame elements use element tree
cases.task: For known frame_id 91234, return only the UI element tree.

cases.name: manual pipe run uses run pipe
cases.task: Run the existing daily-time-report pipe once now.
